TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-dailylife3_Tauyu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kuing ga ralumu ga tawyu yukeh.
S.PHON: kuiŋ ɣa ralumu ɣa tawju jukeħ.
S.FORM: kuing ga ralumu ga tawyu yukeh.
S.PHON: kuiŋ ɣa ralumu ɣa tawju jukeħ.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Tawyu Yukeh.
My name is Tawyu Yukeh.

S.FORM: yukeh na talit.
S.PHON: jukeħ na talit.
S.FORM: yukeh na talit.
S.PHON: jukeħ na talit.
S.TRANSL: Yukeh na Talit.
Yukeh na Talit.

S.FORM: yaya'mu ga lauway na vawnay.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu ɣa lauwaj na *awnaj.
S.FORM: yaya'mu ga lauway na vawnay.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu ɣa lauwaj na *awnaj.
S.TRANSL: 我的母親是Lauway na Vawnay.
My mother is Lauway na Vawnay.

S.FORM: vawnay paliay.
S.PHON: *awnaj paliaj.
S.FORM: vawnay paliay.
S.PHON: *awnaj paliaj.
S.TRANSL: Vawnay Paliay.
Vawnay Paliay.

S.FORM: aring su ulaqi' ga humvu kung runis mavatu'an nu vuraqu.
S.PHON: ariŋ s~ɕu ulaqiʔ ɣa ħum*u kuŋ runis~ɕ ma*atuʔan nu *uraqu.
S.FORM: aring su ulaqi' ga humvu kung runis mavatu'an nu vuraqu.
S.PHON: ariŋ s~ɕu ulaqiʔ ɣa ħum*u kuŋ runis~ɕ ma*atuʔan nu *uraqu.
S.TRANSL: 我小時候時出生在馬都安部落.
When I was a child, I was born here in the tribe of Mavatu'an.

S.FORM: ru aring sku ulaqi' kung ga ini kavalayq kinqiyanuxmu gi ulaqi' ng na' ga ukas i yava'mu ru.
S.PHON: ru ariŋ s~ɕku ulaqiʔ kuŋ ɣa ini ka*alajq kinqijanuxmu ɣi ulaqiʔ ŋ naʔ ɣa ukas~ɕ i ja*aʔmu ru.
S.FORM: ru aring sku ulaqi' kung ga ini kavalayq kinqiyanuxmu gi ulaqi' ng na' ga ukas i yava'mu ru.
S.PHON: ru ariŋ s~ɕku ulaqiʔ kuŋ ɣa ini ka*alajq kinqijanuxmu ɣi ulaqiʔ ŋ naʔ ɣa ukas~ɕ i ja*aʔmu ru.
S.TRANSL: 自從小時候我的生活就一直不是很好,因為我還是個小孩時爸爸就過世了.
Since my childhood, my life has been hard because my father passed away when I was still a child.

S.FORM: yaya'mu ku malahang sami havag sami ka matasuay.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu ku malaħaŋ s~ɕami ħa*aɣ s~ɕami ka matas~ɕuaj.
S.FORM: yaya'mu ku malahang sami havag sami ka matasuay.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu ku malaħaŋ s~ɕami ħa*aɣ s~ɕami ka matas~ɕuaj.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽照顧我們很多兄弟姊妹.
My mother took care of all of us siblings.

S.FORM: ru yaya'mu ga vaq tuminun.
S.PHON: ru jajaʔmu ɣa *aq tuminun.
S.FORM: ru yaya'mu ga vaq tuminun.
S.PHON: ru jajaʔmu ɣa *aq tuminun.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽會編織.
My mother knows how to weave.

S.FORM: savaqnia' maqianux malahang sami ka matasuway ru aqeh hihihi'nia' ru ukas yaya'mu la.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*aqniaʔ maqianux malaħaŋ s~ɕami ka matas~ɕuwaj ru aqeħ ħiħiħiʔniaʔ ru ukas~ɕ jajaʔmu la.
S.FORM: savaqnia' maqianux malahang sami ka matasuway ru aqeh hihihi'nia' ru ukas yaya'mu la.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*aqniaʔ maqianux malaħaŋ s~ɕami ka matas~ɕuwaj ru aqeħ ħiħiħiʔniaʔ ru ukas~ɕ jajaʔmu la.
S.TRANSL: 生活照顧我們兄弟姊妹是她的負擔,而她的身體一直很不好,直到媽媽過世為止.
It was a burden for her to take care of us sibilings and her health had been bad until my mother passed away.

S.FORM: sawni' hani ga kuing nanak.
S.PHON: s~ɕawniʔ ħani ɣa kuiŋ nanak.
S.FORM: sawni' hani ga kuing nanak.
S.PHON: s~ɕawniʔ ħani ɣa kuiŋ nanak.
S.TRANSL: 今天我獨自在這裡.
Today I am here by myself.

S.FORM: nian maqiyanux sami ka kiyutay ana sami havag ga tatuu' sami nanak laka nian maki runi.
S.PHON: nian maqijanux s~ɕami ka kijutaj ana s~ɕami ħa*aɣ ɣa tatuuʔ s~ɕami nanak laka nian maki runi.
S.FORM: nian maqiyanux sami ka kiyutay ana sami havag ga tatuu' sami nanak laka nian maki runi.
S.PHON: nian maqijanux s~ɕami ka kijutaj ana s~ɕami ħa*aɣ ɣa tatuuʔ s~ɕami nanak laka nian maki runi.
S.TRANSL: 縱然我們都在生活,所有的兄弟姊妹也只有三個在這裡而已.
Even though we are living, among all the siblings, there are only three living here.

S.FORM: savilun ku yava' utux kayan.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*ilun ku ja*aʔ utux kajan.
S.FORM: savilun ku yava' utux kayan.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*ilun ku ja*aʔ utux kajan.
S.TRANSL: 上帝把我留下.
God made me stay.

S.FORM: mahuay yava' utux kayan.
S.PHON: maħuaj ja*aʔ utux kajan.
S.FORM: mahuay yava' utux kayan.
S.PHON: maħuaj ja*aʔ utux kajan.
S.TRANSL: 感謝上帝.
Thank God.

S.FORM: nian kung lawkah suku ri'ax sawni.
S.PHON: nian kuŋ lawkaħ s~ɕuku riʔax s~ɕawni.
S.FORM: nian kung lawkah suku ri'ax sawni.
S.PHON: nian kuŋ lawkaħ s~ɕuku riʔax s~ɕawni.
S.TRANSL: 我一直到現在身體都很健康.
I have been healthy.

S.FORM: sami ka vuzi kanayrin maki ragiax ga payux vay ku wawmian.
S.PHON: s~ɕami ka *u*i kanajrin maki raɣiax ɣa pajux *aj ku wawmian.
S.FORM: sami ka vuzi kanayrin maki ragiax ga payux vay ku wawmian.
S.PHON: s~ɕami ka *u*i kanajrin maki raɣiax ɣa pajux *aj ku wawmian.
S.TRANSL: 我們山上的女人呢,真的有很多家務事要做.
As for us women in the mountain, we really have a lot of work to do.

S.FORM: yaya'mu sunga' ga pinsivaqan kungnia' tikay tuminun su siatu' na itaal ga ini' ng kavaq gi ini' kung kanta'tu' makivaq i miru' kung ru.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa pins~ɕi*aqan kuŋniaʔ tikaj tuminun s~ɕu s~ɕiatuʔ na itaal ɣa iniʔ ŋ ka*aq ɣi iniʔ kuŋ kantaʔtuʔ maki*aq i miruʔ kuŋ ru.
S.FORM: yaya'mu sunga' ga pinsivaqan kungnia' tikay tuminun su siatu' na itaal ga ini' ng kavaq gi ini' kung kanta'tu' makivaq i miru' kung ru.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa pins~ɕi*aqan kuŋniaʔ tikaj tuminun s~ɕu s~ɕiatuʔ na itaal ɣa iniʔ ŋ ka*aq ɣi iniʔ kuŋ kantaʔtuʔ maki*aq i miruʔ kuŋ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我母親以前曾教我一點山地服的編織,但是我都不會,因為我沒有認真讀書.
My mother used to teach me a little about how to make the clothes of the indigenous people, but I didn't manage to learn it because I did not work hard in studying.

W.TRANSL: 使役<完成>使役-知道-處焦

S.FORM: ini' ng vaqi kumaal magautux kung ru arua asi kaukas yaya'mu ru sawni' hani la ga havag ku ulaqi'mu uwi ru ti'i matawaw hugal kahavaw.
S.PHON: iniʔ ŋ *aqi kumaal maɣautux kuŋ ru arua as~ɕi kaukas~ɕ jajaʔmu ru s~ɕawniʔ ħani la ɣa ħa*aɣ ku ulaqiʔmu uwi ru tiʔi matawaw ħuɣal kaħa*aw.
S.FORM: ini' ng vaqi kumaal magautux kung ru arua asi kaukas yaya'mu ru sawni' hani la ga havag ku ulaqi'mu uwi ru ti'i matawaw hugal kahavaw.
S.PHON: iniʔ ŋ *aqi kumaal maɣautux kuŋ ru arua as~ɕi kaukas~ɕ jajaʔmu ru s~ɕawniʔ ħani la ɣa ħa*aɣ ku ulaqiʔmu uwi ru tiʔi matawaw ħuɣal kaħa*aw.
S.TRANSL: 我不會聽別人的話,而且變得很頑皮,直到突然間我母親去世了.而今天在這裡我也有了很多小孩,而且他們也都在城市裡工作.
I didn't know how to listen to what others say, and got naughty until suddenly my mother passed away. And today right here I also have many children, and they are all working in the city.

S.FORM: kuing nanak ku nian imu.
S.PHON: kuiŋ nanak ku nian imu.
S.FORM: kuing nanak ku nian imu.
S.PHON: kuiŋ nanak ku nian imu.
S.TRANSL: 我單獨一個人在山上的家裡生活.
I live in the house in the mountain by myself.

S.FORM: asikina ga' lawkah kuing lawkah kung na' matawwaw.
S.PHON: as~ɕikina ɣaʔ lawkaħ kuiŋ lawkaħ kuŋ naʔ matawwaw.
S.FORM: asikina ga' lawkah kuing lawkah kung na' matawwaw.
S.PHON: as~ɕikina ɣaʔ lawkaħ kuiŋ lawkaħ kuŋ naʔ matawwaw.
S.TRANSL: 但是我身體很好,我還可以工作.
But I am healthy. I can still work.

S.FORM: mahuay yava' 'utux kayan ru.
S.PHON: maħuaj ja*aʔ ʔutux kajan ru.
S.FORM: mahuay yava' 'utux kayan ru.
S.PHON: maħuaj ja*aʔ ʔutux kajan ru.
S.TRANSL: 感謝上帝.
Thank God.

S.FORM: nanu' kuara' ku kakanayrinmian runi mavatu'an ga kia na' ku vaq tuminun.
S.PHON: nanuʔ kuaraʔ ku kakanajrinmian runi ma*atuʔan ɣa kia naʔ ku *aq tuminun.
S.FORM: nanu' kuara' ku kakanayrinmian runi mavatu'an ga kia na' ku vaq tuminun.
S.PHON: nanuʔ kuaraʔ ku kakanajrinmian runi ma*atuʔan ɣa kia naʔ ku *aq tuminun.
S.TRANSL: 馬都安部落裡全部的女人呢,還有很多會編織的.
As for all the women here in Mavatu'an, there are still many who know how to weave.

S.FORM: asigi kagaw nawkeh vaq suvalay i tuminun ru vaq lumamu' kavalay su siatu' na itaal.
S.PHON: as~ɕiɣi kaɣaw nawkeħ *aq s~ɕu*alaj i tuminun ru *aq lumamuʔ ka*alaj s~ɕu s~ɕiatuʔ na itaal.
S.FORM: asigi kagaw nawkeh vaq suvalay i tuminun ru vaq lumamu' kavalay su siatu' na itaal.
S.PHON: as~ɕiɣi kaɣaw nawkeħ *aq s~ɕu*alaj i tuminun ru *aq lumamuʔ ka*alaj s~ɕu s~ɕiatuʔ na itaal.
S.TRANSL: 像是Kagaw Nawkeh就真的很會編織和挑選毛線的顏色來製作山地人的衣服.
Take Kagaw Nawkeh for example, she is really good at weaving and selecting the wool color for making clothing of the indigenous people.

S.FORM: nanu' i tumukmian i kainu' na hawving ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ i tumukmian i kainuʔ na ħaw*iŋ ɣa.
S.FORM: nanu' i tumukmian i kainu' na hawving ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ i tumukmian i kainuʔ na ħaw*iŋ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 而我們的頭目是Kainu na Hawving.
And our chief is Kainu na Hawving.

S.FORM: hiya' ku alan niam su malahang suku sami ka vurak na mavatu'an.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ku alan niam s~ɕu malaħaŋ s~ɕuku s~ɕami ka *urak na ma*atuʔan.
S.FORM: hiya' ku alan niam su malahang suku sami ka vurak na mavatu'an.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ku alan niam s~ɕu malaħaŋ s~ɕuku s~ɕami ka *urak na ma*atuʔan.
S.TRANSL: 我們選擇他當頭目來照顧在馬都安部落的我們.
We picked him to be the chief to take care of us in the tribe of Mavatu'an.

S.FORM: ru atu' vay na gumalu' suku salun maha sami ka vurakuku' tumukmian.
S.PHON: ru atuʔ *aj na ɣumaluʔ s~ɕuku s~ɕalun maħa s~ɕami ka *urakukuʔ tumukmian.
S.FORM: ru atu' vay na gumalu' suku salun maha sami ka vurakuku' tumukmian.
S.PHON: ru atuʔ *aj na ɣumaluʔ s~ɕuku s~ɕalun maħa s~ɕami ka *urakukuʔ tumukmian.
S.TRANSL: 我們的頭目非常疼愛我們所謂的部落.
Our chief really loves what we call our tribe.

S.FORM: nanu' i futumuqmian uwi asigi afi.
S.PHON: nanuʔ i *utumuqmian uwi as~ɕiɣi a*i.
S.FORM: nanu' i futumuqmian uwi asigi afi.
S.PHON: nanuʔ i *utumuqmian uwi as~ɕiɣi a*i.

TRANSL.notes: 像是副頭目阿灰也是一樣(很照顧我們).

S.TRANSL: 像是副頭目阿灰也是一樣 .

TRANSL.notes: So does (love the tribe) our vice chief, Afi.

S.TRANSL: So does our vice chief, Afi.

S.FORM: nanu' kuara' ku kakanayrinmian runi mavatu'an ga lawkah matawaw kahavaw ana navakis.
S.PHON: nanuʔ kuaraʔ ku kakanajrinmian runi ma*atuʔan ɣa lawkaħ matawaw kaħa*aw ana na*akis~ɕ.
S.FORM: nanu' kuara' ku kakanayrinmian runi mavatu'an ga lawkah matawaw kahavaw ana navakis.
S.PHON: nanuʔ kuaraʔ ku kakanajrinmian runi ma*atuʔan ɣa lawkaħ matawaw kaħa*aw ana na*akis~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 在馬都安這裡的所有女人,就算是長輩,都非常勤奮地工作.
All the women here in Mavatu'an, even the elderly, work very hard.

S.FORM: ana mawxa' ga lawkah matawaw kahavag gi yaku kakalahang mian sku ulaqi'mian ru.
S.PHON: ana mawxaʔ ɣa lawkaħ matawaw kaħa*aɣ ɣi jaku kakalaħaŋ mian s~ɕku ulaqiʔmian ru.
S.FORM: ana mawxa' ga lawkah matawaw kahavag gi yaku kakalahang mian sku ulaqi'mian ru.
S.PHON: ana mawxaʔ ɣa lawkaħ matawaw kaħa*aɣ ɣi jaku kakalaħaŋ mian s~ɕku ulaqiʔmian ru.
S.TRANSL: 即使生病,所有人還是勤奮工作,因為必須要照顧我們的小孩.
Even when sick, everyone works very hard, because we must take care of our children.

S.FORM: yaki' yutas ga ini'su' pauwi' ga ma'usa' aqih sqang ku hihihi'.
S.PHON: jakiʔ jutas~ɕ ɣa iniʔs~ɕuʔ pauwiʔ ɣa maʔus~ɕaʔ aqiħ s~ɕqaŋ ku ħiħiħiʔ.
S.FORM: yaki' yutas ga ini'su' pauwi' ga ma'usa' aqih sqang ku hihihi'.
S.PHON: jakiʔ jutas~ɕ ɣa iniʔs~ɕuʔ pauwiʔ ɣa maʔus~ɕaʔ aqiħ s~ɕqaŋ ku ħiħiħiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 老人們啊,如果不動一動,身體將會更糟.
For the elderly, if they don't move around, their health is going to get worse.

S.FORM: suoyi asiki ana i ma'uway ku hihihi'mian ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕuoji as~ɕiki ana i maʔuwaj ku ħiħiħiʔmian ɣa.
S.FORM: suoyi asiki ana i ma'uway ku hihihi'mian ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕuoji as~ɕiki ana i maʔuwaj ku ħiħiħiʔmian ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 所以,即使我們身體會累,還是應該(工作).

S.TRANSL: 所以,即使我們身體會累,還是應該 .

TRANSL.notes: Therefore, we should (work) even though our body would get tired.

S.TRANSL: Therefore, we should even though our body would get tired.

S.FORM: nian sami lawkah na' matawwaw sku wawmian raragiax hani ru.
S.PHON: nian s~ɕami lawkaħ naʔ matawwaw s~ɕku wawmian raraɣiax ħani ru.
S.FORM: nian sami lawkah na' matawwaw sku wawmian raragiax hani ru.
S.PHON: nian s~ɕami lawkaħ naʔ matawwaw s~ɕku wawmian raraɣiax ħani ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們還是在山上這裡辛勤地做我們的工作.
We are still doing our work here in the mountains.

S.FORM: nanu' mahuay ku taigaku hani ka muah maqut.
S.PHON: nanuʔ maħuaj ku taiɣaku ħani ka muaħ maqut.
S.FORM: nanu' mahuay ku taigaku hani ka muah maqut.
S.PHON: nanuʔ maħuaj ku taiɣaku ħani ka muaħ maqut.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝這所大學的學生來問句子.
Thank the people from this university for coming to ask about our language.

S.FORM: kia ku yikangmu muah kung i kumal sku sawni hani ga.
S.PHON: kia ku jikaŋmu muaħ kuŋ i kumal s~ɕku s~ɕawni ħani ɣa.
S.FORM: kia ku yikangmu muah kung i kumal sku sawni hani ga.
S.PHON: kia ku jikaŋmu muaħ kuŋ i kumal s~ɕku s~ɕawni ħani ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 今天我有時間來講這些話.
I have the time to come speak about this today.

S.FORM: nanu' ana i ini' taihuk ku kai'mu ana iqat yani ku kai'mu ga asi kung i sawali gi ukas ku vaqunmu gi vali kung i miniru kung.
S.PHON: nanuʔ ana i iniʔ taiħuk ku kaiʔmu ana iqat jani ku kaiʔmu ɣa as~ɕi kuŋ i s~ɕawali ɣi ukas~ɕ ku *aqunmu ɣi *ali kuŋ i miniru kuŋ.
S.FORM: nanu' ana i ini' taihuk ku kai'mu ana iqat yani ku kai'mu ga asi kung i sawali gi ukas ku vaqunmu gi vali kung i miniru kung.
S.PHON: nanuʔ ana i iniʔ taiħuk ku kaiʔmu ana iqat jani ku kaiʔmu ɣa as~ɕi kuŋ i s~ɕawali ɣi ukas~ɕ ku *aqunmu ɣi *ali kuŋ i miniru kuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 今天在這裡,不管怎麼樣,假如我詞不達意,那就這樣吧!因為我知識淺薄,而且我沒有讀過甚麼書.
Today right here, no matter what, if I didn't express myself clearly, then just let it be, because I am not knowledgeable and not educated.

S.FORM: qat kung miniru' ru ulaqi' kung na' ga ukas i naka'ava'mu ru.
S.PHON: qat kuŋ miniruʔ ru ulaqiʔ kuŋ naʔ ɣa ukas~ɕ i nakaʔa*aʔmu ru.
S.FORM: qat kung miniru' ru ulaqi' kung na' ga ukas i naka'ava'mu ru.
S.PHON: qat kuŋ miniruʔ ru ulaqiʔ kuŋ naʔ ɣa ukas~ɕ i nakaʔa*aʔmu ru.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有讀過書,而且父親在我小時候就過世了.
I didn't go to school, and my father passed away when I was a child.

S.FORM: savak maqianux m malahang sami ni naka'aya'mu ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*ak maqianux m malaħaŋ s~ɕami ni nakaʔajaʔmu ru.
S.FORM: savak maqianux m malahang sami ni naka'aya'mu ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*ak maqianux m malaħaŋ s~ɕami ni nakaʔajaʔmu ru.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽照顧我們很辛苦.

TRANSL.notes: It's been a burden for my mother to have taken care (of us).

S.TRANSL: It's been a burden for my mother to have taken care .

S.FORM: kuing hani uwi la ga vali kung i lawkah uwi la ga.
S.PHON: kuiŋ ħani uwi la ɣa *ali kuŋ i lawkaħ uwi la ɣa.
S.FORM: kuing hani uwi la ga vali kung i lawkah uwi la ga.
S.PHON: kuiŋ ħani uwi la ɣa *ali kuŋ i lawkaħ uwi la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 現在我身體也不太好了.
Now I am not healthy anymore.

S.FORM: kuing nanak unian i maqianux ragiax hani.
S.PHON: kuiŋ nanak unian i maqianux raɣiax ħani.
S.FORM: kuing nanak unian i maqianux ragiax hani.
S.PHON: kuiŋ nanak unian i maqianux raɣiax ħani.
S.TRANSL: 現在我一個人在山上生活.
I am now living alone in this mountain.

S.FORM: lu'ulaqimu ga ti'i maki hici kahavaw i matawwaw ru.
S.PHON: luʔulaqimu ɣa tiʔi maki ħiʦ~ʨi kaħa*aw i matawwaw ru.
S.FORM: lu'ulaqimu ga ti'i maki hici kahavaw i matawwaw ru.
S.PHON: luʔulaqimu ɣa tiʔi maki ħiʦ~ʨi kaħa*aw i matawwaw ru.
S.TRANSL: 我所有的孩子都在城市裡工作.
All my children are working in the city.

S.FORM: yani nanak ku kaalmu i.
S.PHON: jani nanak ku kaalmu i.
S.FORM: yani nanak ku kaalmu i.
S.PHON: jani nanak ku kaalmu i.
S.TRANSL: 我要講的話只有這些.
This alone is what I have to say.

S.FORM: ukas ku vaqunmu mi.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ ku *aqunmu mi.
S.FORM: ukas ku vaqunmu mi.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ ku *aqunmu mi.
S.TRANSL: 我比較笨拙,甚麼都不知道.
I am not knowledgeable.

S.FORM: kahavag ku kakanayrinmian runi ga lawkah vasuvalay kahavaw matawaw.
S.PHON: kaħa*aɣ ku kakanajrinmian runi ɣa lawkaħ *as~ɕu*alaj kaħa*aw matawaw.
S.FORM: kahavag ku kakanayrinmian runi ga lawkah vasuvalay kahavaw matawaw.
S.PHON: kaħa*aɣ ku kakanajrinmian runi ɣa lawkaħ *as~ɕu*alaj kaħa*aw matawaw.
S.TRANSL: 這裡所有的婦女們都非常勤奮的做所有的工作.
All the women here are really diligent on all the work.

S.FORM: ansa'mang kahavaw ru malahang sku magu' lami.
S.PHON: ans~ɕaʔmaŋ kaħa*aw ru malaħaŋ s~ɕku maɣuʔ lami.
S.FORM: ansa'mang kahavaw ru malahang sku magu' lami.
S.PHON: ans~ɕaʔmaŋ kaħa*aw ru malaħaŋ s~ɕku maɣuʔ lami.
S.TRANSL: 所有人都勤奮地照顧孫子們.
Everyone work hard to take care of their grandchildren.

S.FORM: yaku magu' nha' ku kalahangan nha' la ru atu' vay na henxinku ku fuyinkay kalkanayrinmian runi i mavatu'an hani.
S.PHON: jaku maɣuʔ nħaʔ ku kalaħaŋan nħaʔ la ru atuʔ *aj na ħenxinku ku *ujinkaj kalkanajrinmian runi i ma*atuʔan ħani.
S.FORM: yaku magu' nha' ku kalahangan nha' la ru atu' vay na henxinku ku fuyinkay kalkanayrinmian runi i mavatu'an hani.
S.PHON: jaku maɣuʔ nħaʔ ku kalaħaŋan nħaʔ la ru atuʔ *aj na ħenxinku ku *ujinkaj kalkanajrinmian runi i ma*atuʔan ħani.
S.TRANSL: 馬都安部落這邊的女人們都非常辛苦地在照顧這些孫子們.
The women in Mavatu'an here work extremely hard to take care of the grandchildren.

S.FORM: ru mahuway simu kahavag.
S.PHON: ru maħuwaj s~ɕimu kaħa*aɣ.
S.FORM: ru mahuway simu kahavag.
S.PHON: ru maħuwaj s~ɕimu kaħa*aɣ.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝你們所有人.
Thank you all.

S.FORM: yani nanak ku kakaalmu.
S.PHON: jani nanak ku kakaalmu.
S.FORM: yani nanak ku kakaalmu.
S.PHON: jani nanak ku kakaalmu.
S.TRANSL: 我要講的話只有這樣而已.
These are just what I have to say.
